name: safe_transit_left_keepout
description: PRZ_WAITINGAREA called from a position above the waiting line (Y=325, in service area) but outside the safe X corridor on the LEFT (X=100, below safe_corridor_x_min=125). Exercises the round-1 _SAFE_SERVICE_TRANSIT corridor-clamp branch that slides X to safe_corridor_x_min before traversing to the waiting area.
